mapper.select: SELECT id, title, author_id, author_name, created_at, views FROM vibe.faq ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.faq (id, title, content, author_id, author_name, created_at, views) VALUES (#{id}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.faq SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
